query:
SELECT 
  CASE 
    WHEN LOWER(name) LIKE '%açaí%' OR LOWER(name) LIKE '%acai%' THEN 'Açaí'
    WHEN LOWER(name) LIKE '%juice%' OR LOWER(name) LIKE '%suco%' THEN 'Sucos/Juice'
    WHEN LOWER(name) LIKE '%salad%' THEN 'Saladas'
    WHEN LOWER(name) LIKE '%fit%' OR LOWER(name) LIKE '%fitness%' THEN 'Fit/Fitness'
    WHEN LOWER(name) LIKE '%vegan%' OR LOWER(name) LIKE '%vegano%' THEN 'Vegano'
    WHEN LOWER(name) LIKE '%natural%' OR LOWER(name) LIKE '%natureba%' THEN 'Natural'
    WHEN LOWER(name) LIKE '%orgânic%' OR LOWER(name) LIKE '%organic%' THEN 'Orgânico'
    WHEN LOWER(name) LIKE '%saudável%' OR LOWER(name) LIKE '%saudavel%' THEN 'Saudável'
    WHEN LOWER(name) LIKE '%poke%' THEN 'Poke'
    WHEN LOWER(name) LIKE '%smoothie%' THEN 'Smoothie'
    WHEN LOWER(name) LIKE '%detox%' THEN 'Detox'
    WHEN LOWER(name) LIKE '%low carb%' THEN 'Low Carb'
    ELSE 'Outros'
  END AS subcategoria,
  COUNT(*) AS total
FROM establishments 
WHERE categoryId = (SELECT id FROM categories WHERE slug = 'saudavel')
GROUP BY subcategoria
ORDER BY total DESC;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway06.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4LUtXE4vPqQU3CD.root --database WG3U3sVg2ZrW6m8T99FRdE --execute SELECT 
  CASE 
    WHEN LOWER(name) LIKE '%açaí%' OR LOWER(name) LIKE '%acai%' THEN 'Açaí'
    WHEN LOWER(name) LIKE '%juice%' OR LOWER(name) LIKE '%suco%' THEN 'Sucos/Juice'
    WHEN LOWER(name) LIKE '%salad%' THEN 'Saladas'
    WHEN LOWER(name) LIKE '%fit%' OR LOWER(name) LIKE '%fitness%' THEN 'Fit/Fitness'
    WHEN LOWER(name) LIKE '%vegan%' OR LOWER(name) LIKE '%vegano%' THEN 'Vegano'
    WHEN LOWER(name) LIKE '%natural%' OR LOWER(name) LIKE '%natureba%' THEN 'Natural'
    WHEN LOWER(name) LIKE '%orgânic%' OR LOWER(name) LIKE '%organic%' THEN 'Orgânico'
    WHEN LOWER(name) LIKE '%saudável%' OR LOWER(name) LIKE '%saudavel%' THEN 'Saudável'
    WHEN LOWER(name) LIKE '%poke%' THEN 'Poke'
    WHEN LOWER(name) LIKE '%smoothie%' THEN 'Smoothie'
    WHEN LOWER(name) LIKE '%detox%' THEN 'Detox'
    WHEN LOWER(name) LIKE '%low carb%' THEN 'Low Carb'
    ELSE 'Outros'
  END AS subcategoria,
  COUNT(*) AS total
FROM establishments 
WHERE categoryId = (SELECT id FROM categories WHERE slug = 'saudavel')
GROUP BY subcategoria
ORDER BY total DESC;
